base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of town_tileset — a tile from 1987 final fantasy. Generic town — shops/inn/houses (208×64). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Generic town — shops/inn/houses (208×64); palette-swapped across 9 towns
